$comment: Overlay of qvac-registry-vcpkg xnnpack@onnxruntime — drop WINDOWS_USE_MSBUILD so Ninja drives cl.exe on self-hosted VS 2026 runners; fix-windows-pthreadpool uses STATIC IMPORTED on Windows; disable hand-written ASM on Windows (GAS-syntax .S incompatible with ml64 + static-CRT MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY ASM error).
name: xnnpack
description: High-efficiency floating-point neural network inference operators for mobile, server, and Web
